---
title: "Tiny C Projects"
description: "My notes & review of [Tiny C Projects](https://www.amazon.com/Tiny-C-Projects-Dan-Gookin/dp/1633439828/ref=tmm_pap_swatch_0) by Dan Gookin"
author: "Tyler Hillery"
date: "2026-07-03"
image: "./cover.jpg"
filters:
    - social-share
share:
    permalink: "https://tylerhillery.com/notes/tiny-c-projects"
    description:
    twitter: true
    facebook: false
    reddit: true
    stumble: false
    tumblr: false
    linkedin: true
    email: true
    mastodon: true
categories: [Tiny C Projects]
---

------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Notes 

## Overview

[My repo to follow along](https://github.com/TylerHillery/tiny-c-projects)

# Review

I felt this was great way to get more hands on programming experience with C. The author adds in some humor throughout the book, some of the jokes land and some don't but I appreciate the author trying to make the book a more fun read.

If you want to get the most of the book I recommend trying to program the solutions before the author shows their's.
